title: Quant Pulse Research Intent
description: Canonical machine-facing intent emitted by Quant Pulse for QuantLab intake.

schema_version.description: Stable schema version for the research-intent payload.

edition_id.description: Quant Pulse edition or snapshot identifier that produced the intent.

created_at.description: UTC timestamp when the intent was generated.

source_ref.description: Optional provenance references such as story IDs, URLs, or edition-local anchors.

signal_summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the signal.

affected_universe.description: Assets, venues, sectors, rails, or systems affected by the signal.

bias.description: Tentative directional bias to validate downstream.

horizon.description: Relevant time window for research or monitoring.

validation_goal.description: What evidence QuantLab should look for to validate the intent.

invalidation_condition.description: Observable condition that invalidates the intent.

risk_filter_hint.description: Hint for risk filters, exclusions, venue gating, or exposure control.

product_priority_hint.description: Hint for instrumentation, coverage, or product backlog priority.

route.description: How QuantLab should route the intent after intake.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes for the editor or consumer.
